summary_one_line: A well-formed TrueType font with valid glyf/loca tables so glyf->get_path succeeds, needing both CMP-solved table tags and gradient-guided offsets.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Exact byte literals identifying TrueType table tags / fixed sfnt header fields (e.g. the 'typ1'/'loca' tag bytes at offsets 0x00-0x0f) that string/integer CMPs in the table-directory parser compare against; these must match exactly before glyf->get_path can locate and walk a glyph outline and return true.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Both winner-resolving seeds carry the ASCII run 'typ1' at offsets 0x00-0x03 and 'loca' at offsets 0x0c-0x0f, planted byte-for-byte, exactly the kind of operand that I2SRandReplace substitutes from the CMP buffer into the input.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The value_profile loser-blocking seeds carry no such tag run at those offsets (zeros, 0xe0, 0x4c, 'G'/'P'/'O'/'S' fragments instead), and value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator to copy the compared tag bytes into place, so it stays on the blocked false side for all 10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer, finds the tag/header bytes the parser compared against, and substitutes them at the matching input offsets; value_profile lacks this mutator and cannot plant the exact tag literals, so only the vpc winner (which has I2S) clears the pair.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Multi-byte offset/length fields in the table directory and loca/glyf headers that must reach jointly-consistent values for the glyph parser to take the true branch; these are wide integer comparisons better solved by gradient-style progressive matching than by single-shot substitution.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: The winner seeds contain structured little-endian-looking dword fields (e.g. offsets 0x18-0x1f with 00 00 1f / 03) that a CMP_MAP Hamming-distance gradient can hill-climb toward, and vpc preserves each closer-matching intermediate as corpus.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog uses only edge-bucket feedback with no CMP_MAP gradient bucket, so partial progress on these wide multi-byte fields is not preserved as new coverage; cmplog stays blocked 10/10 with avg hitcount 0 on the branch.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP records (PC, operand-distance bucket) and rewards inputs whose compared operands are closer to matching, giving a gradient over the wide offset/length fields; cmplog has no such gradient feedback, so vpc (which adds CMP_MAP) is needed to clear this pair over plain cmplog.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of glyf->get_path inside hb_ot_draw_glyph, i.e. a successful TrueType glyph outline parse.
vpc resolves while value_profile is the loser on the I2S-delta pair.
vpc resolves while cmplog is the loser on the value_profile-delta pair.
Winner-resolving seeds carry the ASCII tag run 'typ1' and 'loca' in the opening bytes.
Loser-blocking seeds begin with unrelated bytes, not a TrueType tag run.
The opening offsets where the tag literals live differ between W and L with W concentrated on the tag bytes.
cmplog's I2SRandReplace substitutes a compared operand into the input at matching offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`I2SRandReplace` reads the post-execution `CmpLogObserver` buffer,
picks a CMP entry, scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile's CMP_MAP rewards inputs whose compared operands are closer to matching, giving a gradient.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog uses the same edge-bucket signal as naive with the CMP buffer consumed by the mutator, not by feedback (no CMP_MAP gradient).
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
The CMP buffer is
consumed by the mutator, not by feedback.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog stays blocked all 10 trials with zero hits on the branch.
A winning vpc seed's ancestor chain contains an I2S-floor dash row.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 7245 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed d862f87dd0cadddf`; the chain has 13 ancestor levels and the tool reported the I2S-floor signal: 1 dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 12, characteristic of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with the same glyf parse gate where value_profile alone (no I2S) resolves the true branch at the same rate as vpc, showing the exact tag-literal substitution by I2S is not necessary.

weakest_evidence_point: The split between the I2S axis (exact tag literals) and the VP axis (wide offset/length gradient) is inferred from byte structure and mechanism, not from a direct measurement isolating which field each fuzzer solves.
